title: Vision conveyors
description:
Vision conveyors

Vision conveyors

A vision conveyor uses a camera to locate parts that will be retrieved by one or more robots.  In this section, instructions are provided for vision conveyor calibration.

The straight conveyor and circular conveyor have different calibration methods.
